reviews.review_msg: Pointless name as she has not even one percent input in the course, the course is run by TM who is evading, vague and unsure. No clue about what to expect in the written exam. Useless and disappointing. It took me three hours to attempt half of the exam in the open book as it was totally unexpected. There was nothing from what we did for 13 weeks:(

There's isn't much I can add that hasn't already been said, scroll down and read the other comments because it's all true. I don't understand what her role is anyways, you never hear from her and it's always the TA that you're communicating with an marking everything. The instructions are SO unclear and vague for assignments, it's ridiculous.

Already ready to help and as long as you show interest and put in the effort you will get a good grade. The midterm was tough but he marks everything fairly. He cuts the 4 hour lecture down into 3 hours which is great. Its hard to balance lecture and lab time and I think he did a great job of doing so.

Steve is the best prof I have ever had at SFU. The midterm was super hard but even though my word crashed 10 mins before the exam ended he let me hand it in later. He is super understanding and all his assignments and grades are fair. He is also always available for help. Put the time in and you will get a good grade.

Liz is is a naive fool.  Restorative justice is BS, and she's been sucked in by it.  People like her result in our revolving crimincal justice system.  She's close minded to anything else, and very arrogant in her views.

Liz is one of the few profs who tries to be the change she envisions.  As for the comment about Liz hiding in the uni, maybe you should check out her track record for work in the prison and you'd discover otherwise.

Up for a challenge? Love being active and tested to your limits? want the ride of your life? love the feel of exhaustion? well we're not talking about joining the police force, but this prof will give you all that! enlist today.
Very unhelpful and opinionated which is completely what she teaches in RJ classes.
He is the best TA i have ever had!!!, so much fun and very passionate about RJ! I would take any classes he ever ta's

Phenomenal class. Expect to develop your knowledge of finance immensely, book and lectures prepare you well for tests. Always open for office hours and makes his own personal effort to bring in business professionals into the classroom to speak about their experience. One of the best profs, I've ever had. Prev poster was irate after the midterm.
It is easy to get an A in this course. But it is difficult to learn anything from him. This course makes me think that finance is useless.
